Block.Para: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (personating peace officer or public officer)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends the Criminal Code to establish that personating a police officer or a public officer for the purpose of committing another offence must be considered by a court to be an aggravating circumstance for sentencing purposes.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Criminal Code (personating peace officer or public officer)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (personating peace officer or public officer)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Criminal Code is amended by adding the following after section 130:

Para.change: 130.1 If a person is convicted of an offence under section 130, the court imposing the sentence on the person shall consider as an aggravating circumstance the fact that the accused personated a peace officer or a public officer, as the case may be, for the purpose of facilitating the commission of another offence.

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
